item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Indus Finance Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 77
item.description: Delivering an impressive 124.47% return over the past year, Indus Finance Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 77 on 23 Apr 2026, defying the broader market's downward trend. This milestone caps a four-day winning streak that has propelled the stock nearly 10% higher, underscoring the powerful momentum behind this rally. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts AXISCADES Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2023.55
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, AXISCADES Technologies Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 2023.55 on 23 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 144.21% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained upward price action, even as the broader Sensex index trades lower. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Jubilant Agri & Consumer Products Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of Jubilant Agri & Consumer Products Ltd experienced notable intraday weakness on 23 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,756.5, reflecting a 5.0% decline from previous levels. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid sustained selling pressure and cautious market sentiment. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd Surges 7.47% to Day's High of Rs 1289.25 — Outperforms Sector by 7.05 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 1.14% on 23 Apr 2026, yet KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd surged 7.47%, outperforming its sector by over 7 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid broader market weakness, signalling a noteworthy shift in momentum. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Thomas Cook (India) Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Apr 2026
item.description: Thomas Cook (India) Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 23 Apr 2026, with its stock price touching a low of Rs 99.7, marking a decline of 6.85% during the trading session. This underperformance reflects mounting price pressures amid a broadly negative market environment and sectoral headwinds. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Tech Mahindra Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Apr 2026
item.description: Tech Mahindra Ltd. experienced a notable decline on 23 Apr 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,416, reflecting a 3.2% drop as the stock underperformed amid broader market weakness and sector pressures. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Strides Pharma Science Ltd Surges 7.51% to Day's High of Rs 1068.7 — Outperforms Sector by 4.97 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined 1.14% on 23 Apr 2026, Strides Pharma Science Ltd surged 7.51%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by nearly 5 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which has been on a steady upward trajectory over the past week. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: DLF Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Apr 2026
item.description: DLF Ltd. witnessed a notable intraday decline on 23 April 2026, with its share price touching a low of Rs 591.5, reflecting a 3.1% drop. This underperformance came amid broader market weakness and sector-specific pressures, resulting in the stock lagging behind its Realty sector peers and the benchmark Sensex. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Half-Year Rally with 175.4% Return Outperforming Benchmark
item.description: Covance Softsol has emerged as the standout performer among micro cap stocks over the past six months, delivering an exceptional return of 175.4%, significantly outpacing benchmark indices and peers across sectors. This remarkable rally reflects a combination of robust financials, attractive valuation, and positive technical momentum, positioning the stock as a compelling buy in the Computers - Software & Consulting space. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Exceptional Stock Returns with 2775.79% Gain in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered an extraordinary return of 2775.79% over the past year, vastly outperforming its peers and benchmark indices. This remarkable surge highlights the stock’s strong fundamentals, attractive valuation, and positive technical momentum, making it a standout performer in a challenging market environment. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 2,012 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd, a prominent player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, achieved a significant milestone on 23 April 2026 as its stock price reached an all-time high. This landmark event reflects the company’s robust financial performance and sustained growth trajectory over recent years. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Swiggy Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Swiggy Ltd, a mid-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has witnessed a notable 11.26% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a slight dip in the stock price and a downgrade to a Strong Sell rating, the underlying volume and open interest data suggest complex directional bets unfolding ahead of the next trading sessions. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Vishal Mega Mart Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd (VMM) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock has outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by rising volumes and a notable increase in futures and options participation, reflecting evolving investor positioning in this mid-cap diversified retail player. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Waaree Energies Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Waaree Energies Ltd, a mid-cap player in the Other Electrical Equipment sector, has witnessed a notable 12.6% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, reflecting a marked shift in market positioning and investor sentiment. This development comes amid a backdrop of outperformance against its sector and the broader Sensex, suggesting growing bullish interest despite a slight dip in the stock price. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Mankind Pharma Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Mankind Pharma Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector peers, registering a 2.39% gain on 23 Apr 2026, supported by a 27.23% increase in open interest, reflecting growing bullish sentiment despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Sell. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Piramal Pharma Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Bullish Momentum
item.description: Piramal Pharma Ltd (PPLPHARMA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by rising volumes and a notable increase in delivery volumes, suggesting growing conviction among market participants despite a recent downgrade in its mojo grade. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: PB Fintech Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: PB Fintech Ltd (POLICYBZR) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by a seven-day consecutive gain and robust volume patterns, suggesting evolving directional bets among traders. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Delhivery Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Delhivery Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.15% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. This surge in open interest, coupled with volume patterns and price movements, suggests evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among traders in the transport services sector. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Signalling Market Positioning Shift
item.description: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd, the parent company of NYKAA, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, reflecting heightened market activity and a potential shift in investor sentiment. The 15.95% increase in OI, coupled with robust volume and rising delivery volumes, suggests growing bullish positioning amid a mid-cap stock environment that continues to outperform its sector peers. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a large-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has witnessed a notable 14.13% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, raising questions about the directional bets underpinning this activity. Time: 47 minutes ago
